/usr/bin/ar qc libzlib.a  CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/adler32.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/compress.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/crc32.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/deflate.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/gzclose.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/gzlib.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/gzread.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/gzwrite.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/infback.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/inffast.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/inflate.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/inftrees.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/trees.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/uncompr.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/zutil.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/contrib/minizip/ioapi.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/contrib/minizip/mztools.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/contrib/minizip/unzip.c.o CMakeFiles/zlib.dir/contrib/minizip/zip.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libzlib.a
